issues.title: Could not parse multipart form.
issues.body:
![1721054621586](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6d770db5-f63c-4df0-9556-3eedf4037070)


The audio file is put under resources. Here is my code.
`@RestController
public class TranscriptionAPIController {

    @Resource
    private OpenAiAudioTranscriptionModel openAiAudioTranscriptionModel;

    @GetMapping("ai/test6")
    public String test6(ServletRequest request){

    @GetMapping("ai/test7")
    public String test7(ServletRequest request){

        OpenAiAudioTranscriptionOptions options = OpenAiAudioTranscriptionOptions.builder()

            .withModel("whisper-1")
            .withTemperature(0F)
            .withResponseFormat(TranscriptResponseFormat.TEXT)
            .build();

        ClassPathResource resource = new ClassPathResource("tjf.flac");
        String result = openAiAudioTranscriptionModel.call(resource);
        System.out.println(result);
        return result;
    }
}`

Access http://localhost:8080/ai/test7.

The console prints the following content as the picture shows:
`org.springframework.ai.retry.NonTransientAiException: 400 - {"error":{"message":"Could not parse multipart form (request id: 202407152238294396212527XJaJCHx) (request id: 20240715223829437497276VT0cfiFX)","type":"invalid_request_error","param":"","code":null}}

comments.body: I did some search and found some people successfully ran the same code and did not got the issue.

![a](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/72cad4d4-56ec-4f08-b602-87c13793c019)
After debug, I found that you must add the the code in the image above so that you can run successfully.

But there's a problem, the official website shows it has the default value json, I think it's a bug.
![b](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1a399748-3eac-47ee-b759-5831ebd94b47)

Additionally, if you add
`.withResponseFormat(TranscriptResponseFormat.TEXT)`
you will get the same problem.
@YuJiaoYan1024 I believe this is resolved by changing the response format. Please reopen if that is not the case.
